jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Dunzo
jsonLd.description:
Dunzo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
